programmes.show_description: (1960) Western with James Craig. A former gunslinger tries to restore order to a lawless town, but is foiled by the efforts of an evil saloon owner whose infirmity grants him immunity from violence.
(1966) Western starring Jack Nicholson. Mistaken for outlaws, three cowboys find themselves on the run from a relentless posse hungry for justice.
The airline's customer service team face the challenge of getting passengers to Florida when the flight they are booked onto is oversold.
A daughter is embarrassed by her angry father, a grandmother is not allowed to travel with her oxygen canisters, and a delighted couple return home after adopting their baby daughter.
A bride-to-be is refused permission to fly for being too drunk, two Southwest pilots elope to Las Vegas to get married, and a bridal gown fails to make it home in one piece.
A blizzard threatens to ruin a newlywed couple's honeymoon, and a customer service supervisor tries to defuse a heated argument between two passengers at check-in.
A passenger faces the prospect of missing his son's operation after missing his flight, and an electrical failure causes a blackout onboard a grounded plane.
Witness the U.S. Coastguard at work as they battle the elements to perform daring sea rescues and save the lives of those in danger.
Witness the U.S. Coastguard at work as they battle the elements to perform daring sea rescues and save the lives of those in danger.

(2018) Thriller with Ashleigh Dorrell. Amy begins her first night shift at a hotel. But this is a place with a dark past, and sometimes history repeats itself... Will she survive the graveyard shift?
(2015) Tense drama with Lynn Collins. After a whirlwind wedding, a single mother finds herself committed to an institution when her husband plans to take everything she has - including her daughter.
A woman vouches for her ex-husband after he seemingly kills his new wife in self-defence but after he is let off the hook, she discovers his elaborate ploy. Starring Marguerite Moreau (2017)
(2019) Thriller with Vanessa Marcil. A college student returns home to discover her mother has a new fiancé. But as she finds out more about him, should it be alarm bells rather than wedding bells?
(2022) Thriller with Brooke Burfitt. A pregnant woman hires a doula to help with her home birth. But as delivery day approaches and shocking secrets emerge, who can she really trust?
(2012) Crime thriller with Cynthia Watros. After a robbery leaves her beloved niece in a coma and the cops have no leads, a woman goes from victim to vigilante and takes matters into her own hands.
(2020) Thriller starring Julie McNiven. A grieving couple donates their dead daughter's organs. But the recipient of her heart exhibits a disturbing and sinister obsession.
A former police detective takes on the local mob to avenge his estranged son's death. Stars Steven Seagal, Johnny Messner, DMX (2019)
A CIA agent has to stop Islamic terrorists from teaming up with Mexican cartels to smuggle weapons of mass destruction into the U.S.

(2021) Tense action with Bruce Willis. A troubled sheriff steps in when a group of small-town thugs take a local doctor hostage, demanding the truth behind a teenager's disappearance a decade earlier.

(1952) Western starring Sterling Hayden. After the Civil War a rancher is wrongfully imprisoned in a notorious desert prison. When a deadly plague threatens to overwhelm the jail, can he help stop it?
(1958) Western starring Alan Ladd. A soldier returns home after the Civil War to find his wife dead and his son shocked into silence. He rides out, determined to find both a cure and justice.
A couple of unusual passengers are causing excitement on a flight to Chicago's Sea World, and a man dressed as a tiger causes intrigue on the ground in Chicago.
There is frustration for the Airline staff as passengers turn up late and irate, and a passenger faces an anxious wait as she tries to get to her dying mother in time.
Two unaccompanied minors are close to boarding the wrong flight, and team members audition for the staff holiday cabaret - with the winners performing for passengers at the departure gates.

(2018) Drama thriller starring Chelsea Hobbs. Crime fiction becomes a horrifying reality when a novelist's daughter is abducted in a copycat scenario taken straight from her latest book.

(2017) Thriller with Jamie Luner. Tess is finally ready to live again after her son's death years before. But a brief romance with a handsome soldier is about to twist from attraction into obsession..
(2021) Deadly drama with Scout Taylor-Compton. A pair of adopted twins are surprised to meet their triplet who was separated from them at birth, but three's a crowd - especially when one's a killer.
(2012) Crime thriller with Cynthia Watros. After a robbery leaves her beloved niece in a coma and the cops have no leads, a woman goes from victim to vigilante and takes matters into her own hands.
A former police detective takes on the local mob to avenge his estranged son's death. Stars Steven Seagal, Johnny Messner, DMX (2019)
A mercenary is hired by an drug lord to break his son out of a maximum security prison. Starring Steven Seagal (2006).
